subject:
Re: Can someone tell me the best resolution of the EMDB-10164
 dataset with M
body:
OK. I will follow the tutorial link with dynamo. And check about this.
在2021年5月18日星期二 UTC+8 下午8:42:02<alist...@gmail.com> 写道：

> During stack creation this parameter doesn’t affect anything (tilt angles 
> in .rawtlt are written out the same), only during tilt-series import (where 
> the tomostar files and tilt-series XML files are created) is this checkbox 
> taken into account.
>
> According to 
> https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/2d-preprocessing.html#stack-generation we 
> did not check the ‘don’t invert tilt angles’ box when we processed 
> successfully. The alternative should also work, and I have heard of others 
> processing successfully using that checkbox, it just didn’t work in my 
> hands when I had that option checked and rather than investigating more 
> thoroughly I accepted a working procedure once I had one.
>
> Cheers,
>
> Alister
>
> On 18 May 2021, at 13:25, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com> wrote:
>
> I checked   ‘don’t invert tilt-angles’  both when the import tilt series 
> to IMOD and from IMOD. Is that OK?
>
> 在2021年5月18日星期二 UTC+8 下午7:55:22<yuqi zhang> 写道：
>
>> I remembered I checked the ‘don’t invert tilt-angles’ and detect the 
>> defocus handness. 
>>
>> 在2021年5月18日星期二 UTC+8 下午4:51:28<alist...@gmail.com> 写道：
>>
>>> Hi Yuqi,
>>>
>>> 2500 particles per tilt-series or 2500 particles from 20 tomograms? If 
>>> the latter, that’s very few particles. For reference, we used 19810 
>>> particles from 5 tilt series to get a 3.4A reconstruction from the same 
>>> dataset (full walkthrough 
>>> https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/introduction.html). I 
>>> believe Dimitry has the same subset at 3.3 or so - the full dataset has 
>>> been pushed to 3.0A (as described in the M paper).
>>>
>>> I had a similar problem at some point with refinements of this data 
>>> getting ’stuck’ at 10A or so (in RELION) - at some point I processed the 
>>> same data tagain, the only differences were in the ‘don’t invert 
>>> tilt-angles’ on tilt-series import and subsequent defocus handedness 
>>> checks, one refined to below 4A no problem whilst the other got stuck at 
>>> 10A. The procedure described in the walkthrough linked above works in our 
>>> hands.
>>>
>>> Good luck!
>>>
>>> Alister
>>>
>>> On 18 May 2021, at 08:59, yuqi zhang <8245...@qq.com> wrote:
>>>
>>> Can someone tell me the best resolution of the EMDB-10164 dataset with M?
>>>
>>> I used the series 1-20. I used the EMD4045 to template matching. And I 
>>> matched near 2500 particles and did refinement in Relion 3.0. After M 
>>> refine,  I only got 10A.
>>>
>>> I wanted to know whether I have to do or learn more about the workflow.
>>>
>>> -- 
>>> You received this message because you are subscribed to the Google 
>>> Groups "Warp" group.
>>> To unsubscribe from this group and stop receiving emails from it, send 
>>> an email to warp-em+u...@googlegroups.com.

>>> .
>>>
>>>
>>>
